comment.body:
Anyone here besides me track NYSE up/down volume? It's one way I look for major divergences. As of now it's showing one. Up volume is at 38% on this green day. Below 40% on a green day gives me some pause about bullish continuation for the following week. 

Btw last time there was a divergence like this was October 28 which hit an ATH that day and following but then the drop happened from there.
